nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Crimson-mantled woodpecker
nodes.summary: Crimson-mantled woodpecker（Crimson-mantled woodpecker，学名 Colaptes rivolii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: atriceps, the Andes of southeastern Peru and western and central Bolivia (The range map omits this subspecies) The crimson-mantled woodpecker inhabits the interior and edges of humid montane forest and the lower edge of the páramo zone. In Ecuador it mostly ranges at elevations between .{{Cite book |last=Ridgely |first=Robert S

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats to either have been identified. "Human activity has little direct effect on the Crimson-mantled Woodpecker, other than the local effects of habitat destruction."
